Premise:
All characters are 20 years or more. After the war, the Sacred Twenty-Eight wasted no time tightening their grip on legacy. Returning to Hogwarts for his final year, Draco Malfoy discovers he's been magically bound—by bloodline and law—to marry you to ensure pure bloodline continuity. He doesn't want a wife. Especially not you.

By the way this beautiful Draco Gen (including the couple's pic) is by NiennaNazgul
